description_long: This warehouse is a large, rectangular brick structure with a dark, steeply pitched gabled roof. The exterior walls show a mix of exposed red-brown brickwork and patches of weathered, faded gray plaster, giving it a worn, utilitarian appearance. The main facade features a central entryway with a pointed arch and symmetrical window arrangements, some of which are boarded up or bricked over. Metal awnings and a small overhang provide minimal shelter above certain doors and windows, while thin support columns line the base of the building. The roof is uninterrupted and solid, with no visible skylights or rooftop equipment, emphasizing its industrial function. Subtle details like faded signage and a utilitarian lamp fixture add to the sense of age and practical design.
description: A large, weathered brick warehouse with a steep gabled roof, faded plaster patches, and minimal decorative features. The structure has a central entryway, boarded windows, and metal awnings, reflecting a utilitarian industrial style.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the steep pitch of the dark roof and the weathered brick and plaster wall, with a small overhang and minimal window detail.
description_view_1: The main facade features a central entryway with a pointed arch, symmetrical window arrangements, faded signage, and metal awnings supported by thin columns.
description_view_2: The opposite side view shows a similar roof pitch, boarded windows, and a large double door, with less architectural detail than the main facade.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the long, uninterrupted roof and a mostly plain brick wall with minimal window openings and faded plaster patches.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade is constructed of exposed red-brown brick with large patches of faded gray plaster, featuring a central pointed-arch entryway, symmetrical window arrangements, and metal awnings supported by thin columns. Faded signage and a utilitarian lamp fixture add to the industrial character.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is a steeply pitched gabled structure covered in dark shingles, with no visible skylights or rooftop equipment, emphasizing a solid and uninterrupted form.
